name: Black Magic Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, baking powder, and salt in a mixing bowl.
2. Add eggs, oil, black coffee, buttermilk, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients. Beat with an electric mixer set at medium speed for 3 minutes.
3. Pour batter into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
4. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
5. Cool the cake in the pan on a rack.
6. Frost with Hundred Dollar Frosting and cut into squares.
Hundred Dollar Frosting:
1. Combine butter (or margarine) and semisweet chocolate in a double boiler set over hot water, stirring until melted.
2. Remove from heat and allow to cool well.
3. Add egg and stir vigorously.
4. Stir in confectioners' sugar, vanilla extract, and lemon juice. Beat until smooth.
5. Stir in chopped walnuts.
6. Frost the cooled cake with the icing.
